headline: Environmental defenders face 18 lawsuits in Sarawak
context: Eighteen strategic lawsuits against public participation (SLAPPs) were filed against environmental activists in Sarawak between 2022 and 2025.

cards.big: 18 SLAPP suits filed against Sarawak environmental activists since 2022
cards.sub: Logging and plantation companies use defamation suits to silence critics

cards.big: No anti-SLAPP legislation exists in Malaysia to protect public interest speech
cards.sub: Defendants face average legal costs of RM120,000 per defamation suit

cards.big: UN Aarhus Convention protects environmental defenders' right to public participation
cards.sub: Malaysia has no equivalent domestic protection for environmental advocacy

cards.big: 12 of 18 defendants are indigenous community leaders defending NCR land
cards.sub: SLAPP suits create fear that silences entire communities from speaking out

cards.big: Using courts to bankrupt environmental defenders weaponises justice against rights
Sarawak Dayak Iban Association raised SLAPP concern in state assembly in 2024
